raw.message:
WE'VE MISSED YOU! 🤗
Rejoin us and claim your surprise gift!
Limited time only. What are you waiting for?

hook.summary: A vibrant Chinese-themed slot machine interface featuring a large dragon and a massive 10 trillion coin offer.
hook.visual_action: The dragon's eyes glow and the background pulses with light behind a large scroll displaying the coin reward.
hook.text_overlay: SPECIAL OFFER! CLAIM UP TO 10 TRILLION FREE COINS

scene_flow: Introduction of the Dragon 8 slot theme and the 10 trillion coin special offer.
Visual emphasis on the dragon's glowing eyes and the massive coin amount to draw attention.
Persistent display of the offer with a legal disclaimer regarding virtual currency at the bottom.
on_screen_text: No purchase necessary to play. In-game rewards are not real money.
cta_text: CLAIM UP TO 10 TRILLION FREE COINS
audience_proxy: Adult social casino players who are motivated by high-value virtual currency rewards and traditional slot themes.
